MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Philip Tam.
Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Annalisa Shealey is present.
Attorney Wendy W. Sullivan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of DEC-19-2011 is vacated.
